heading: Appointment and compensation of employees by Secretary of Conference of Majority of Senate and Secretary of Conference of Minority of Senate
label: 6156 Appointment and compensation of employees by Secretary of Conference of Majority of Senate and Secretary of Conference of Minority of Senate
text: Effective , the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority and the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority are each authorized to appoint and fix the compensation of such employees as they deem appropriate: , That the gross compensation paid to such employees shall not exceed $70,000 each fiscal year for each Secretary.October 1, 1979Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61g–4 of this titleSection is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1979.

Increases in CompensationIncreases in compensation for Senate officers and employees under authority of Federal Pay Comparability Act of 1970 (), see Salary Directives of President pro tempore of the Senate, set out as notes under .Pub. L. 91–656section 4571 of this title
